Class InteractableManager

java.lang.Object
model.entity.detectable.InteractableManager
public class InteractableManager extends Object
Main manager of the interactables entities, used to help with the interactions between Interactable (closer to the Player) and Player.

  • Constructor Summary

    Description

  • Constructor Details

    • InteractableManager

      public InteractableManager(List<Furniture> furnitures, List<Terminal> terminals, Optional<ControlRoom> cRoom)
      InteractableManager constructor that collects the furnitures, the terminals and the control room
      Parameters:
      furnitures - All the furnitures
      terminals - All the terminals
      cRoom - Control Room if present

  • Method Details

    • update

      public void update(Player player)
      Update checks first if the current interactable is a furniture and let update the percent of the furniture if the player is interacting with it. If not it sets the furniture interaction to false and if the percent reached 0 when the player is not interacting it anymore, it gives to the player the item and disable the furniture
      Parameters:
      player - Used to read his actions and giving the item

    • checkInteractable

      public boolean checkInteractable(Play p)
      Player interaction to the interactable
      Parameters:
      p - Used in some interactables to set the playState
      Returns:
      boolean Returns the result of the action if you successfully interacted or not

    • checkCurrentPercent

      public float checkCurrentPercent()
      Checks the current percent if the current interactable is a furniture
      Returns:
      float The current percent of the current interactable if is a furniture

    • isNear

      public boolean isNear(Player player)
      The difference between this and nearInteractable is this one doesn't alterate the currentInteractable, giving only the information if the player is near an interactable
      Parameters:
      player - To check if is near any interactable
      Returns:
      boolean Result of the check if the player is near any interactable
